title: Center top section on Schweiz, Basel, and Zürich landing pages (desktop view)

requirements.summary: Apply horizontal centering to the topmost (hero) section of SwissOnlineCouplesLandingPage, BaselCouplesLandingPage, and ZurichCouplesLandingPage in desktop view, matching the centering style used in lower sections on these pages.
acceptanceCriteria: On desktop viewport widths (≥ 1024px), the topmost section of SwissOnlineCouplesLandingPage is horizontally centered.
On desktop viewport widths (≥ 1024px), the topmost section of BaselCouplesLandingPage is horizontally centered.
On desktop viewport widths (≥ 1024px), the topmost section of ZurichCouplesLandingPage is horizontally centered.
The centering style matches the layout style used in the lower sections of these same pages.
Mobile layout is not affected by this change.

file_operations.description: Add responsive centering classes (e.g., `max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 lg:px-8`) to the topmost hero section container in desktop view (≥ 1024px), ensuring the centering matches the style applied to lower sections on this page. Do not alter the mobile layout or change the content/structure of the section.

Add responsive centering classes (e.g., `max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 lg:px-8`) to the topmost hero section container in desktop view (≥ 1024px), ensuring the centering matches the style applied to lower sections on this page. Do not alter the mobile layout or change the content/structure of the section.

Add responsive centering classes (e.g., `max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 lg:px-8`) to the topmost hero section container in desktop view (≥ 1024px), ensuring the centering matches the style applied to lower sections on this page. Do not alter the mobile layout or change the content/structure of the section.
